title: SettlementIntent
description: XAP v0.1 — The escrow instruction. Funds locked. Condition declared. Verification method specified. Release or rollback logic defined upfront. No ambiguity at settlement time. The core primitive of XAP.

settlement_id.description: Globally unique settlement identifier. Used for idempotent calls. Safe to retry.

state.description: Current settlement state. Every state has a defined transition. No money ever in limbo.

negotiation_id.description: The NegotiationContract that created this SettlementIntent. Provides full audit chain.

payee_agent_id.description: Agent that will receive funds on successful condition verification.

locked_amount.description: Total amount locked in escrow. Cannot be accessed by either party until settlement resolves.

settlement_unit.description: Unit of account for this settlement. e.g. 'USD', 'USDC', 'XAP_CREDIT'

condition.description: The condition that must be satisfied for funds to release. Copied from NegotiationContract at intent creation. Immutable.

split_rules.description: Revenue split across multi-agent workflows. Orchestrator → subagents → tools. Every layer gets its declared share automatically. Think royalty distribution, not payments.

share_type.description: Whether this recipient gets a percentage of total or a fixed amount.

percentage.description: For share_type: percentage. All percentages across split_rules must sum to 100.

fixed_amount.description: For share_type: fixed. Deducted from locked_amount before percentage splits.

role.description: Role of this recipient in the execution chain.

partial_completion_eligible.description: Whether this recipient receives pro-rata payment on partial completion.

execution_result.description: Populated by the executing agent upon task completion. Used for condition verification.

submitted_by.description: agent_id of the agent submitting this result.

output.description: Raw execution output. Condition verification runs against this.

quality_score.description: Self-reported quality score. Used when condition_type is probabilistic.

completion_percentage.description: For partial completions. Drives pro-rata calculation.

execution_signature.description: Ed25519 signature by executing agent over this result object.

verification_result.description: Populated by XAP condition verification engine after execution_result is submitted.

condition_met.description: Whether the declared condition was satisfied.

verification_detail.description: Human and machine readable explanation of the verification outcome.

failure_handling.description: Pre-declared outcomes for every failure mode. Agents cannot have money in limbo.

on_full_failure.description: What happens when execution fails completely.

on_partial_completion.description: What happens when execution partially completes.

on_timeout.description: What happens when execution_deadline passes with no result submitted.

on_verification_ambiguity.description: What happens when condition verification cannot produce a clear result.

idempotency_key.description: Client-provided key for idempotent settlement calls. Agents retry safely. System handles duplicates gracefully without double-charging.

execution_deadline.description: Hard deadline for execution result submission. Triggers failure_handling.on_timeout if missed.

settled_at.description: Timestamp of final state resolution. Present when state is terminal.

execution_receipt_id.description: ID of the ExecutionReceipt created on settlement. Links to permanent audit trail.

condition.description: Release payment when confidence_score in output is >= 0.90
